_source: Core Rules pp.63-64 — Victory Conditions + Difficulty Modes
_note: Select at campaign start. Cannot be changed mid-campaign. Cannot add conditions after start. Only one selected condition counts, even if you qualify for others. Completing awards Elite Rank (p.65). Character upgrade deaths still count toward the total.

UPGRADE_1_CHARACTER_10_TIMES.name: Upgrade a Character 10 Times
UPGRADE_1_CHARACTER_10_TIMES.description: Upgrade a single character 10 times. The character does not have to be in the crew at the end — deaths still count.

UPGRADE_3_CHARACTERS_10_TIMES.name: Upgrade 3 Characters 10 Times
UPGRADE_3_CHARACTERS_10_TIMES.description: Upgrade 3 characters 10 times each. Characters do not have to be alive simultaneously.

UPGRADE_5_CHARACTERS_10_TIMES.name: Upgrade 5 Characters 10 Times
UPGRADE_5_CHARACTERS_10_TIMES.description: Upgrade 5 characters 10 times each. Characters do not have to be alive simultaneously.

TURNS_50_CHALLENGING.name: 50 Turns in Challenging Mode
TURNS_50_CHALLENGING.description: Play 50 campaign turns in Challenging mode

TURNS_50_HARDCORE.name: 50 Turns in Hardcore Mode
TURNS_50_HARDCORE.description: Play 50 campaign turns in Hardcore mode

TURNS_50_INSANITY.name: 50 Turns in Insanity Mode
TURNS_50_INSANITY.description: Play 50 campaign turns in Insanity mode

easy_mode_restrictions._note: Easy mode can only complete these two conditions (Core Rules p.64)

per_rank_benefits: One bonus story point per Elite Rank
Receive 2 XP per Elite Rank, assignable to any characters, resolving Character Upgrades immediately (Note: pre-campaign upgrades do not count for Upgrade victory conditions)
For every 3 Elite Ranks, roll up an additional starting character (still limited to starting crew size, but pick from larger pool)
For every 5 Elite Ranks, pick one Stars of the Story option that can be used twice (must pick at campaign start)

CUSTOM_TURNS.name: Custom Turn Goal
CUSTOM_TURNS.description: Complete a custom number of campaign turns

CUSTOM_BATTLES.name: Custom Battle Goal
CUSTOM_BATTLES.description: Win a custom number of battles

CUSTOM_QUESTS.name: Custom Quest Goal
CUSTOM_QUESTS.description: Complete a custom number of quests
